description: Invention-complete witness manifest — English-scoped by default (LAPLACE_INGEST_LANGS=en)

language_scope.law: Every witness source remains in the manifest. Language filters reduce which languages are ingested from multilingual corpora — not which witnesses exist.

synset_hub_law: WordNet synsets (WordNetSynset offset+pos) and senses (wordnet/sense/{key}) are the shared anchor. OMW attaches to synset IDs. VerbNet attaches to sense IDs. PropBank attaches lemmas→rolesets→VerbNet. FrameNet attaches lemmas→frames. SemLink aligns PropBank↔VerbNet↔FrameNet. ConceptNet/Atomic2020 share the lemma arena but do not use synset IDs.
ordering_law: unicode → iso639 → wordnet → omw → verbnet → propbank → framenet → semlink → conceptnet → atomic2020 → ud → wiktionary → functionality → image/audio

wordnet_cluster.links: anchor: synsets, senses, lemma arena, pointer graph
lemma HAS_SENSE roleset; roleset CORRESPONDS_TO verbnet/class
/c/en/ terms — shared ContentEmitter lemmas, not synset IDs
script relations (XWant, Causes, …) on event atoms

functionality.law: Repos and code corpora deposit PRECEDES + HAS_EXAMPLE. Document bit-perfect proof is NOT seed — use scripts/win/ingest-text.cmd or e2e-full.cmd (db-roundtrip sandbox).

test_data.roundtrip_proof: scripts/win/ingest-text.cmd or e2e-full.cmd — db-roundtrip sandbox, not seed-substrate
